item.title: Time for the unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
i knew it.. greetings online friends
yep... there's your problem
sounds like they should start a company
don't look to the right gang
reminds me of that Simpsons go to Japan episode
as is tradition
Columbus- what a goof
befuddling
mmm hmm
rookie numbers
stay strong. those who are partaking
finally
good times
the dream
that technique is so sick
always
certainly not exclusive to 70s music
that's my time.. have a great weekend, gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Happy Birthday Imgur. My 15th Favorite from 2016
item.dc:creator: IraqiWalker

item.title: You’re not alone
item.description:
You’re not alone
You’re not alone
Suicide is the leading cause for Australians aged 15 to 44. Traffic accidents also are in the top three causes of death for young Australians. https://www.abc.net.au/news/2023-09-27/abs-deaths-in-graphs-covid-heart-disease-suicide/102907992 Men’s helpline Australia 1300789978 You’re not alone
item.dc:creator: thebansheee

item.title: 15 years extra
item.description: 15 years ago, my best friend from high school sent me a picture. He said, “good news, you skip all the reading on Reddit”… We spent years laughing our selves out of depression. Reminding each other not to go to that park, not to jump, and if either one of us got it into our head that this was … the way…, we promised to go stand at hopper’s hands and call every single contact on our phones before we did anything else. And, one day, he lost the battle. Didn’t text back. He didn’t stick to the plan. And, I’m not here as much. But, Imgur gave us, the less wordy, a place to “talk” with dark humored memes and images of hope. Disappearing into the silly and the beautiful. Goodbye Zorya!
item.dc:creator: CosmicSurfingInstructor

item.title: My 15th favorite. .. Also my first post in 10 years, happy birthday imgur!

item.title: I’m not bringing children into this mess
item.description: Most Viral edit: I didn’t expect this to make front page. I can’t respond to everyone but just know that I’m happy with my decision, it was a very easy procedure, and with good conscience, I couldn’t bring more humans into this world.

item.title: I'm in Canada and the hammer just passed over my house a few minutes ago
item.dc:creator: iwasdoingfinelurking

item.title: Tough day
item.description:
She went from sluggish to dead in a matter of hours. Urgent care had her less than hour. We live 4 minutes away and they sent us home and we didn't make it back in time when they called us back in. Our 5 year old handled it great. Wife and I are wrecks internally. Zoe crossed the bifrost at 12.5 years old. I'll miss her forever. Just needed to vent.
Her favorite spot, about to nap. Edit: Ok, wow fellow Imgurians. I just wanted to thank you all for the compassion and solidarity you've expressed here. I don't often make posts and I was expecting my vent to die in user sub as you do. Your comments have brightened and eased a pretty awful day for my wife and I. Thank you so much. Hug your fur, feather, etc babies. I send you all my love. Keep the faith.
item.dc:creator: galactushungers

item.title: Guess I should lower my work ethic a bit to simply meet expectations

item.title: The 410th
item.description:
Are they OK? How did they get hurt?
STAY TUNED! I'm running out of MeeMays again and I'm going to be cutting down posting frequency for a little while. I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild EVERY OTHER Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
How is anyone this dumb?
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #SoundOn #Dump #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.title: Another BUCKET LIST checked off! (Frazetta!)
item.description:
Went to Florida and drove to the beautiful island of Boca Grande, where Sara Frazetta runs her grandfather's museum: The Frank Frazetta Art Museum! I've known Sara forever but have never gotten together with her IRL, so this was amazing! Had the most amazing day ever.
The entrance (complete with gargoyles!)
Egyptian Queen (1969) -- the inspiration for the iconic 'Slave Leia' outfit from Return of the Jedi (George Lucas was a huge Frazetta fan!)
Here is the iconic painting DEATH DEALER, probably the most recognizable piece. Definitely Google Frank Frazetta's amazing work if you want to see more; he's a legend and I can't do his career justice in a single Imgur post. Hope you enjoyed the pics! Blake xx
item.dc:creator: BlakeNorthcott
